fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language that is used when translating specified text on documents to foreign business partner, such as an item description on an order confirmation.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date from which the text will be used on the item, account, resource or standard text.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date on which the text will no longer be used on the item, account, resource or standard text.

fields.name: All Language Codes
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text should be used for all language codes. If a language code has been chosen in the Language Code field, it will be overruled by this function.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the content of the extended item description.

fields.name: Sales Quote
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on sales quotes.

fields.name: Sales Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on sales invoices.

fields.name: Sales Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on sales orders.

fields.name: Sales Credit Memo
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on sales credit memos.

fields.name: Purchase Quote
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on purchase quotes.

fields.name: Purchase Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on purchase invoices.

fields.name: Purchase Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on purchase orders.

fields.name: Purchase Credit Memo
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on purchase credit memos.

fields.name: Reminder
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the extended text will be available on reminders.

fields.name: Finance Charge Memo
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the extended text will be available on finance charge memos.

fields.name: Sales Blanket Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on sales blanket orders.

fields.name: Purchase Blanket Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on purchase blanket orders.

fields.name: Prepmt. Sales Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on prepayment sales invoices.

fields.name: Prepmt. Sales Credit Memo
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on prepayment sales credit memos.

fields.name: Prepmt. Purchase Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on prepayment purchase invoices.

fields.name: Prepmt. Purchase Credit Memo
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on prepayment purchase credit memos.

fields.name: Job
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on projects.

fields.name: Sales Return Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on sales return orders.

fields.name: Purchase Return Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will be available on purchase return orders.
